title: Logitech Wireless Mouse M325 (Celebration Black)
description: SMALL BUT MIGHTY Get work done anywhere with this small portable mouse. The size of M325 makes it great for users with smaller hands-including kids-or limited workspaces. The micro-precise scrolling and tilt wheel provide you the speed and accuracy you need. Easy-to-use and compatible with all of the main OS, it's ready to work in seconds and lasts up to 18 months without changing batteries. COMFORTABLE SHAPE, COMPACT DESIGN Stay productive longer thanks to the comfortable, contoured shape that follows the natural curve of your hand. Compact and wireless, M325 fits easily with your laptop in a bag-making it great for working on the go and homeschooling. It's also designed for both right- and left-handed users, allowing you to switch the left and right click via Logitech Options Software. FAST SCROLLING, PRECISE TRACKING Our micro-precise scrolling and tilt wheel give you the speed and precision you need to breeze through long pages, websites, links, spreadsheets, and images. Customize the tilt action to perform horizontal scroll, forward/backward, and more through Logitech Options. PLUG & PLAY SIMPLICITY Simply plug the USB receiver into your computer or laptop to start working in seconds and get a strong, reliable connection within up to 10 meters (33 feet),Plus, you can easily pair through the same receiver up to six compatible peripherals using Logitech Unifying™ technology. BROAD COMPATIBILITY M325 is compatible with most OS-Windows®, macOS®, Linux®.And is also a certified Works with Chromebook™product. INCREASED PRODUCTIVITY Get more done by combining M325 with your laptop. According to a recent study, laptop users who chose this mouse over a touchpad were 50% more productive and worked 30% faster. QUALITY YOU CAN RELY ON The mouse is built with the same high quality standards that have made Logitech t
features: Pointing Device Connectivity Technology: Wireless

Movement Resolution: 1000 dpi

reviews.title: Mouse
reviews.text: Good mouse for my computer

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: works great

reviews.title: Portable, durable and pretty
reviews.text: I travel for work and needed something light and easy to take with me to various work locations. I had a Microsoft wireless mouse but for some reason it didn't properly scroll in some of the programs I use for work so I replaced it with this one. It works great, it is easy to install, works even when the receiver portion is plugged into a USB splitter, and the design is cheery.

reviews.title: The Standard
reviews.text: The Logitech M325 is pretty much the standard wireless mouse that so many people have. The color pattern is nice and vibrant, and it's a cheap buy.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Great colors and my daughter loved it

title: Corsair Ironclaw Wireless RGB, Rechargeable Wireless Optical Gaming Mouse with Slipstream Technology (18,000 DPI Optical Sensor, 3-Zone RGB Multi-Colour Backlighting), Black
description: The Corsair Ironclaw RGB Wireless Gaming Mouse combines an ultra-accurate native 18, 000 DPI optical sensor with a durable contoured shape that’s ideal for larger hands and palm grips. Easily connect to your PC via hyper-fast, sub-1ms Slipstream Corsair Wireless Technology Bluetooth or USB wired connection, with up to 50 hours of battery life. Powerful Corsair iCUE software allows you to precisely tune sensitivity in 1 DPI steps, customize the ten programmable buttons with macros or remaps, and synchronize your mouse’s three-zone RGB lighting with all your iCUE-compatible Corsair devices. With the freedom of wireless and the customizable precision you need to take your gameplay higher, take victory in hand with the Corsair Ironclaw RGB Wireless.
features: Three Ways to Game: Connect with hyper-fast, sub-1 ms Slipstream Corsair Wireless technology, low-latency bluetooth, or USB wired
Comfort when it counts: Contoured shape that’s sculpted specifically for palm-grips and larger hands

Powerfully precise optical gaming sensor: A custom Pixart PMW3391 native 18,000 DPI sensor, adjustable in one DPI resolution steps, gives you total sensitivity customization and ultra-accurate tracking
Ten fully programmable buttons: Customise the way you play with powerful macros and key remaps to give you an in-game advantage
Ultra-durable Omron Switches: Rated for more than 50 million clicks

reviews.title: Excellent design and clean software- dollar store plastic mouse
reviews.text:
Worked great for three months; varying software issues and the mouse spontaneous resetting had us replace the mouse with the same one, as the setup and software for this mouse is very easy. The programmable buttons are easy to reach and press. However, if I am paying 200 for a mouse, I expected more than 3 months of use.

Edited to add:
New mouse worked almost two months before the mouse wheel stopped functioning. Went to a different brand. Cannot in good conscience recommend.

reviews.title: Mouse Hasn't Worked Properly Since Day 1, Customer Service Slow to Respond/Ineffective
reviews.text:
I bought this mouse brand new. It has NEVER worked as advertised, and Corsair's customer support team has done nothing to make it right. The mouse couldn't connect via GHz on my Macbook (despite Corsair and its reps claiming it should work on macOS. See:

https://www.amazon.com/ask/questions/Tx1JD042VHLLA6L/ref=ask_dp_dpmw_al_hza

I then tried to use a Windows laptop to connect to iCUE and program the mouse. AGAIN, nothing. They've implied that the mouse might have some compatibility issues, but that should've been addressed! They haven't even offered to refund me or replace the mouse. Stay far away from this mouse, and if you value good, responsive customer service, stay away from this company.

reviews.title: Good mouse for the most part
reviews.text: I bought mine at Best Buy and not Amazon. It lasted about a year and a half. Still mostly works but the wheel button doesn't work anymore.  If you are going to use the wheel button a lot, don't buy this mouse. Other problems include the battery doesn't last too long, can't customize when it is in Bluetooth mode, and it has the habit of thinking every time you plug it into the computer to charge it is a new mouse so it creates a new profile. It looks great and feels great though and I would buy it again if it didn't cost so much money

title: HP 15.6" HD Touch Screen Laptop Bundle , AMD A12-9720P Quad core processor 2.7 GHz, 8GB DDR4, 1TB HDD, DVD, WiFi, Webcam, Windows 10, Gray, Wireless Mouse and Backpack Included.
description: This stylish Touchscreen laptop in Smoke Gray offers reliable performance and long-lasting battery life so you can easily surf, stream, and stay in touch with what matters most. With the latest AMD Quad-Core A12-9720P processor, AMD Radeon R7 Graphics, 8GB DDR4 Memory, and 1TB Hard Drive, this laptop delivers the reliable performance you need to work and play.
features: Brand New in box. The product ships with all relevant accessories

reviews.title: Laptop is not like new it is new the box had never been opened, Thank You So Much
reviews.text: I'm so happy with this purchase the items are exactly as described

reviews.title: Sucks, Slow, Terrible, Missing pieces.
reviews.text:
Extremely slow unless you know how to disable 50 or so features that run off the bat. The mouse came with no bluetooth adapter, and this doesn't have built in bluetooth.
Seriously don't buy HP.

1 hour of ownership update: It's stopped opening windows. It brings up the login screen, then I get a black screen. The computer no longer works and I've done nothing to it. There are several other reviews referring to this issue.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: so far its a great buy. I like it

reviews.title: Excelent value laptop
reviews.text: My daughter needed a faster more copact laptop for her graphics software so we gave this one a try.  Very fast, easy setup...nice and easy to chuck the bloatware.  A reasonable price made it an easy choice...so much so that we purchased another.

reviews.title: Definitely returning and buying a different brand
reviews.text: I had high hopes for this laptop... very very very slow. I mean how can a company like HP in this day in age make a laptop this slow. I didn’t expect speeds you would see in a gaming laptop for this price but I at least want to be able to watch a movie or even start the laptop within 10 minutes, and they don’t even allow you to upgrade the RAM or anything from what I can tell... and the battery life is laughable, like a previous comment said, about 1 percent per minute. I would even go as far as to say that it dies faster than that. Purchased this for my sister for her birthday but will definitely return and go with a different laptop.

title: Wired Pink Keyboard and Mouse Combo, RaceGT 102 Keys Wired Typewriter Keyboard Phone-Groove Design, 2.4G Silent Comfortable Wireless Mouse, Compatible with Computer, Laptop and Desktop
features: 【 Wired keyboard For Phone -groove design】The wired keyboard is designed with a mobile phone-groove, suitable for placing smart phones, iPads and other devices. You can put it horizontally or vertically according to the size of your device, which is very convenient for you to watch videos, reading document and other entertainment at office or home.
【Multimed Knob Function】Humanized multimedia design, convenient and fast multimedia switching and fast music adjustment. Four buttons to control music in time, convenient and fast.

【Punk Keycaps and Splash-Proof Design】ABS injection molded keycaps, stable structure, non-toxic and odorless. Light matte surface treatment technology, care for your fingertips. The panel is provided with a waterproof conductive film, and the key caps are suspended to facilitate water to flow out from the side.

【Silent wireless mouse and wired keyboard】 The new punk keycaps and mouse buttons are designed to be silent, the keyboard is comfortable and quiet for typing, and the mouse is super silent, creating an excellent office environment for you, allowing you to focus on your work and avoid disturbing others. wireless mouse is powered by 1 AA battery (batteries are not included).

【Universal Compatibility & Great Service】 This mouse and keyboard is compatible with all Windows system versions, Linux, Chrome OS, Mac OS, suitable for desktop, PC, laptop, computer, Chromebook. Professional customer service is on standby for 24 hours and promises to give you a satisfactory solution.

reviews.title: ASMR fantastic!
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:5a9baeffb5013de01b566ac34f1da8a5]] Love the way this keyboard sounds as I type.  I also like that the round keys allow a little more room in between keys and that I don’t make as many errors while typing.  The color is great and the design is think and sleek.

reviews.title: my favorite keyboard
reviews.text: This keyboard is the best! It is comfortable to use, matches my desk setup perfectly, and best of all, the keys AND the mouse are basically totally silent! My 10-month-old is a VERY light sleeper! Everything wakes her up, but not these. A major win for me! Highly recommend. 100% I would buy this again! (batteries are not included. You need one aa battery for the keyboard and also the mouse)

reviews.title: Wired + Wireless?  Work for you? Good multimedia controls & phone slot
reviews.text:
Not a fan of wireless accessories (the batteries typically fail without warning, makers want you to be surprised), I made an exception for this pairing model because the keyboard is wired.

PRO
-Ubiquitous AA battery for mouse
-Economical
-Numeric pad
-Multimedia buttons: Volume knob, buttons for mute, pause, previous, next
-A place to put your phone (nice touch!)

CON
-Neither is backlit
-KB not programmable

NEUTRAL
-Non-'clack-y' key design, these are "quiet"
-Some humans will like pink, not widely available, maybe a good gift
-Con (for me) is the wireless mouse

reviews.title: Fun cordless mouse and keyboard
reviews.text: This is a great little retro cordless keyboard and mouse combo. I ordered it because it has just one dongle that both operate from. That gives me more USB ports available for other things. It works great as long as the keyboard and mouse are close to the laptop or the tower. It lags a bit when it’s in a keyboard drawer. I like the compact and portable nature this setup includes!

reviews.title: pink keyboard and wireless mouse
reviews.text: Love the pink color of this retro keyboard and mouse.  Great that the keyboard is spill proof I can have my coffee and not worry about wrecking my keyboard.  Easily plugged right into my all-in-one computer.  Took me a little while to get used to the punk keycaps, and now I love how quiet and comfortable they are to use.  The mouse fits well in my hand, and the wheel rolls back and forth smoothly. Top 5 stars for this one!

title: Unipows Wireless Mouse - 2.4G Slim Portable Computer Mouse with Nano Receiver, Less Noise Mobile Optical Mice for Notebook, PC, Laptop, Computer, Mac (Black and Grey)
description:
Enjoy freedom and efficiency when you use the Wireless Mouse. Compact design, easy to take to anywhere. Plug the nano transceiver into your computer's USB port for a reliable wireless connection without any hassle of additional wire and driver. High Movement resolution allows the mouse to track on nearly any surface. Quiet clicks make you concentrate more on your work, and don’t disturb people around.
Product features:
Wireless connectivity for reliable usage Advanced optical mouse with responsive tracking Noiseless click, soft touch  High dpi movement resolution works on most surfaces. Wireless mouse reduces workspace clutter 3-button mouse for better functionality and fast scrolling capability
Specification:
Dimensions: 1.4 x 2.6 x 4.7 inches (H x W x D)  Battery: 1 x AA battery (not included) Handedness: Ambidextrous Interface(s): USB 2.0 Wireless: Yes Warranty: 1 year Brand Compatibility: Universal Model Compatibility: PC, Laptop, Windows devices System Requirements: Windows XP, Windows 7, Windows Vista, Windows 8, Windows 10, Windows 2000, Mac OS X 10.4 or later Number of Buttons: 3 Mouse Operation: Button(s) with scroll wheel Plug and Play Operation: Yes
Package include:
1 x Wireless Mouse 1 x USB nano Receiver (stored in back of the mouse)
features: Portable and Noiseless - Stow the USB receiver inside the wireless mouse when not in use. Take it to anywhere like home, office, coffee shop, etc. Responsive buttons provide soft click with less noise.

2.4GHz Stable Wireless Connection - A tiny wireless receiver (stored in back of the mouse) provides stronger anti-interference ability, faster transmission speed and more reliable connection up to 15m (49 feet), without any hassle of additional wire and driver. Just plug and play.

Enduring Quality & Power Saving - High DPI Movement resolution allows the mouse to track on nearly any surface. Rated to 5 million comfortable clicks. Turn into sleep mode in 8 minutes of inactivity for energy saving, easily activated by clicking any button. 1 AA Battery (NOT Included) is needed for this mouse.
Ergonomic Shape & Smooth Hand Feeling - Slim ergonomic design and smooth surface for an incredible user experience. Space grey perfect for office use, and can match any color device.

Wide Compatibility - Work with Windows XP, Windows Vista, Windows 7, Mac OS X 10.4 etc. NOTE: This product is connected by USB receiver, and is NOT compatible with Macbook pro or other laptops which only come with type C port.

reviews.title: Very cute.
reviews.text:
Really love this mouse. It is very cute, lightweight, easy to use and comfortable in your hands. Very easy to set up. Only issue was the back covering is a bit loose. Think it is a factory fault or something. It isn't falling off so far though, thankfully. That's is why it lost a star.

Overall I was very pleased with the product. Really looovvvve how cute it looks.

reviews.title: Perfect !
reviews.text: Bought this mouse to replace my old one . This one is super quiet . Scrolls perfect world perfect . It takes 1aa battery and that’s great ! The price was great and the mouse is well worth every penny!

reviews.title: It depends on what you want to do with it
reviews.text: It cannot connect to 5ghz wi-fi and it's battery life is not exceptional. It has maintained a solid connection to the 2ghz wi-fi which is enough for watching videos, shows and browsing the internet. It's too slow for serious online gaming. I do like the case and keyboard it sits up fine for me with the case. Overall it is a good deal for this price if you're looking for something to write with or watch shows on.

reviews.title: Great service and sleek tablet
reviews.text: Great service. Love that they made sure I knew how to activate the warranty. Comes with a lot of great accessories. The Tablet has worked great with my 4g sim as my POS at the boutique I attended. Just as I needed. Thank you

reviews.title: Love this tablet!

reviews.title: Seems to be great so far
reviews.text: Battery life has been good,runs smoothly,downloads fast ,easy to use.

reviews.title: A Tablet that does everything!
reviews.text: I love this tablet.  It is so easy to use and it has everything you could want already on it.  I did have a problem with which SIM Card I needed and where to put the SIM card.  I contacted the seller and he replied within 30 minutes.  That is what you call service.  I liked it so well I have ordered another one.  I highly recommend this tablet and this seller.

reviews.title: awesome mouse, awesome vendor!
reviews.text: mouse was delivered a little earlier than expected, which is great! corsair is a highly trusted brand and the last one we had, same model, lasted a good 3 years before the stroller wheel gave out. there probably is a way to just clean the wheel, but we just got a new mouse and intend on keeping the old one. it has extremely smooth dpi and motion with a nicely weighted feel. good solid unit!

reviews.title: Good FPS mouse
reviews.text: The materials wear really easily but it was perfect for my build and is light enough for the games I play, love the dpi buttons

reviews.title: double click problem after only 6 months
reviews.text: Bought this 6 months ago, now 6 months later I'm having this "double left click" problem. I thought this issue is rare, turned out it's extremely popular with this new Corsair mouse. My last 2 Corsair mice lasted 12 years, this one is garbage. Do not buy this unless you plan on doing RMA with Corsair while waiting 30 days for them to replace your mouse like I am right now. Extremely frustrating. If you don't believe me, search for all other corsair mice, they all have low 4 star reviews with double left click problems.

features: [Plug-and-play & function button] Plug-and-play No need to install a dedicated driver, just plug the USB receiver into your computer and enjoy this vertical mouse right away. Equipped with function buttons, convenient "forward / back" buttons for web browsing and spreadsheet software are standard equipment.

[Ergonomic and anti-fatigue design] Ergonomic, anti-fatigue vertical design is suitable for all hand types. vertical angle helps to reduce wrist muscles strain, keep your wrist in a natural state ,encourages healthy neutral "handshake" wrist and arm positions for smoother movement and reduce muscle tension, prevent repetitive stress and injury, and not feel tired after prolonged use.

[Built-in rechargeable battery & energy saving] Built-in rechargeable battery, no longer need to buy batteries. With breathing LED light, if you do not operate for 3 seconds, it will enter power saving mode, if you do not operate for 8 minutes, the mouse will enter smart sleep mode. Press any button to restart. Power saving design extends battery life. Takes 3-4 hours to fully charge, which can be used for about 7-8 weeks.

[DPI can be adjusted in three steps & long life button] Equipped with a high-performance optical engine, switch the cursor speed to 800, 1200, 1600 DPI according to the case, freely change the mouse speed, The optical tracking technology provides smoother and preciser tracking than a regular optical mice. Meets the request for regular work, study, design work etc.Button long life design can be about 5 million times.

[2.4GHz wireless connection] With a USB receiver, safe and advanced 2.4GHz wireless transmission technology and optical tracking technology, no driver required, just connect to USB port of laptop or computer, effective transmission distance of 10 meters. Warranty period: We provide a one-year warranty period from the date of purchase, and if there is a failure during the warranty period, please contact us from Amazon purchase history and we will respond immediately.

reviews.title: GREAT BUY!
reviews.text:
I had purchased an ergonomic mouse prior to this one. It was rechargeable as well and died less than an hour after lite use. It was not very comfortable and felt cheap. When i received this one I was skeptical because it did feel lite weight and I worried it would be cheap quality. It is comfortable & light weight, rechargeable long lasting charge. I use it for work it lasts all day and since I work from home I used it at night as well without needing a recharge until bed time. I have switched to regular mouse a couple times when i forgot to charge mine and there is a huge difference in comfort. I have a hand injury and when i use a regular mouse my hand hurts, after using this one I see a big difference when I have had to switch back. Highly recommend.

** update: i’ve now had this for several months and I have actually ordered another one which I haven’t had to take out of the box. I honestly ordered it because I lost the charging cord to my first one which I rarely use. I think I charge this mouse maybe once a week if that and I use it up to 15 hours a day with work and it never dies.

reviews.title: Love this mouse!
reviews.text: This is the 3rd one so I can have 2 at work in case I forget to charge it I have a backup and 1 at home.  The buttons aren't as quiet on this one and it's not that pretty shiny purple as pictured but if you're an Admin Asst like me you will love it! It took away my shoulder and wrist pain.

reviews.title: Great for carpal tunnel!
reviews.text: I bought this mouse for its ergonomically design. It is great for my carpal tunnel. Sleep mode is fantastic and it’s easy to charge, which it does quickly.

reviews.title: Nice, but too large for my hands
reviews.text: This was a nice mouse. Scrolled smoothly. However the scroll wheel was too far to comfortably use with my hands. I had to keep reaching for the wheel and it was causing stress on my elbows. I ended up retuning it. I will look for a smaller mouse that will fit my hands better. If you have large hands this mouse will work well for you.

title: Neises LED Bluetooth Mouse,Bluetooth Mouse for MacBook Pro/MacBook Air/iMac/mac/ipad/ipad pro,Wireless Mouse for Macboook Air/MacBook Pro/PC (Silver)
description:
✅Packing list: Instructions*1, LED rechargeable Bluetooth5.1 + 2.4G dual-mode mouse *1, 2.4g Nano USB receiver *1(hidden in the slot at the bottom of the mouse), USB charging line *1, USB C-type adapter *1
✅How to connect to a laptop using bluetooth mode:
Turn on the Bluetooth switch at the bottom of the mouse > open the computer system Settings > open Bluetooth >when the computer bluetooth display is looking for nearby bluetooth devices, find the "BT5.1 mouse", click the connection, and then successfully connected, you can use the mouse.
✅ How to connect to iOS/iPad/Pro/Air/ Mini/ Phone (ios 13/ios 14) via Bluetooth Mouse
first slide the button at the bottom of the mouse to the bluetooth " " position. ( bluetooth mode.)
(1) open tabletSettings >Accessibility > Touch > AssistiveTouch > Click to open （An auxiliary dot will appear on the screen）
(2) Go back to Settings > Click on the bluetooth > Click to open > BT 5.1 MOUSE > connect and Pair.（PIN:0000)
🔋How to Charge Wireless Mouse?
🔋When the pointer of your mouse does not move or cannot be used, or suddenly disconnects continuously in use, you need to charge it for about 3 hours. Please use the USB port of your computer to charge it, or use an adapter with an output of no more than 5v to charge it
✅ How to use the 2.4G receiver mode:
Open the 2.4G receiver mode at the bottom of the mouse, remove the USB receiver at the bottom of the mouse,Plug the USB receiver into your computer's USB port and move the mouse to start working，If your laptop is a Type C port, first plug the Type C adapter into your laptop's Type C port, then plug the mouse's USB receiver into the Type C adapter, and then move the mouse to work
💡 7-color LED mouse: After the mouse is successfully connected to your computer/laptop/iPad device, the 7-color LED starts to light one by one.
features: ERGONOMIC DESIGN： Good surface coating technology given you a skin-like touch feeling. User-friendly design provide all-day comfort for work and entertainment, portable and pocket-sized perfect for travel, Mute design keeps away annoying clicks.

For all computers and laptops and ios13 / ios14 tablet/pro/Air / Phone / MAC / MacBook / Pro / air windows / chromebook / HP / Dell
💡 7-color LED mouse: After the mouse is successfully connected to your computer/laptop/iPad device, the 7-color LED starts to light one by one.

The blue light beside the scroll wheel will be on while charging, and then goes off when the mouse is fully charged.

reviews.title: These are great sounding computer speakers
reviews.text:
I have the Klipsch Pro Media Thx 2.1. These are great sounding computer speakers. They best the Bose Companion II which sound terrible in comparison. the Bose sound shallow and weak. These speakers have 3 1/2 inch long throw woofers for the midrange, and a real subwoofer for the lows. They are great sounding for what they are and the best computer speakers to my knowledge in the $200 or below genre.

However, they need to be tweaked. The subwoofer is slightly heavy (although an adjustment is on your speakers) and the highs are slightly bright like other Klipsch speakers, and the midrange is slightly recessed. Simply set your computer system from Windows at 70% output roughly, then pull up iTunes (if you use it) or another equalizer, and set the low bass from about 65K down about 3db below average, put the midrange from about 125K on up to about three 3DB higher than normal, then set the 1K at zero, and above that from 2K on up about 3db below zero. You can adjust that a little to make a curve

These speakers are great. I went with refurbished myself at a little over half price. Enjoy! They are great.

P.S. I am an audiophile who has a good ear and an extremely good stereo system. These do not equal that, but sound great for what they are and better than all others for $200 or less and close to the $400 plus systems.

reviews.title: Not natural sounding but that's how I like my computer speakers to sound
reviews.text: I'm not clear what the differences are between this model and the other identically labelled model from other sellers that sell for less money. You shouldn't pay more than $120-$135 for these from what I can tell after shopping around. I bought mine in "like-new" condition for $99 with Prime free shipping and I'm ecstatic about the sound quality. Subwoofer is boomy and the sat speakers are bright. Typical Klipsch sound. Not natural sounding but that's how I like my computer speakers to sound. I compared these to the Logitech at $105-$120. I own a pair of those too. I'm a fan of Logitech. Make that, I used to be a fan. Going to go with Klipsch if I ever have need for more speakers. These sound great. You won't be disappointed if you like the "Klipsch sound."

reviews.title: The satellite speakers are clear with a good amount of range and depth whether playing games or ...
reviews.text: First experience with Klipsch speakers and I am thoroughly impressed! Wasn't expecting the amount of impact from the subwoofer (my previous pc came with a factory 5.1 setup and fall flat compared to these). The satellite speakers are clear with a good amount of range and depth whether playing games or listening to music/watching videos. I was worried that a 2.1 setup would leave something to be desired vs a 5.1 setup, but I'm glad I made the jump!

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: Perfect just as described

reviews.title: No better computer speaker out there
reviews.text:
There is simply no better set of computer speakers out there. The subwoofer rivals those home theater setups as well. I have this in my office connected to a Mac Mini which I often use for iTunes and watching movies, and recording to Garageband.

I have never cranked the volume 100%, it's incredibly loud at 65%. Bass is very smooth and powerful.

I actually needed speakers for an outdoor wedding and actually brought these to the event, no one complained about not being able to hear the ceremony even 20 rows back.

If you can't afford a home theatre system, consider this 2.1 for your living room as well. This will surprise you.

reviews.title: Great battery life
reviews.text: I'm still not fully decided about how I feel about this mouse. But, I can talk about what I know so far. The packaging I got the mouse and was really nice, really simple, but easy to open. The mouse was easy to set up, and the RGB looks pretty cool. There is a really cool DPI changer function that makes gaming much easier, however, I can't recommend this mouse for gaming because the ergonomics are pretty trash. I have to cramp my hand like a claw over the top of the mouse and after long periods of use it does start hurting. The surface is also pretty slippery, so I found that my hand slips on the mouse all the time. The tracking however, is great! And I would have to say that biggest plus is the battery life. I got this about 2 weeks ago, charged it once, and it is yet to die! I think the features of this mouse are great, but I would not recommend it. Purely because of the ergonomics, if you are going to use this mouse often, then you probably should go if something more ergonomic.

reviews.title: Basic but functions well
reviews.text: I ordered a ‘LED Wireless Mouse, Uiosmuph G12 Slim Rechargeable Wireless Silent Mouse, 2.4G Portable USB Optical Wireless Computer Mice with USB Receiver and Type C Adapter (Silver)’ for review.  For the price point, this is a basic mouse.  The rotating light strip is a cool looking feature.  It is sleek in design.  It connected well with the dongle to my Surface Pro.  It glides well over a mouse pad.  It is rechargeable, which I prefer to battery operated.  The click of this mouse is quiet. The dongle slides into the bottom and of course it has already been lost.  I prefer the dongle to be stored in a closed compartment on a mouse.  It does not require recharging for several days of moderate use and seems to charge quickly.  Overall, for basic use, this mouse works well.

reviews.title: Nice design
reviews.text: I use this with my netbook to control it across the room. It is smaller than most other mouse. It goes easily in my travel bag. Nice design. I got tired of plain black.

reviews.title: One of the best everyday mice I've used
reviews.text:
I have input devices for drawing on my tablet, and I have a gaming mouse, but the Logitech M305 is an excellent mouse for every day use, so it's the one I use the most.

The mouse itself has very basic features,
* scroll wheel (mild clicking feedback)with side-click options
* battery status light (green when fully charged, red when almost out)
* two buttons
* an off switch
* a nano USB transmitter than stores inside the mouse
* uses a single AA battery

It does come in jazzy designs, and I liked the yellow/gold one the best. The one thing I might have wanted to change on this mouse is the on/off switch. The best nano-USB mouse I've ever had would automatically turn off when you stored the transmitter inside. With this one, be sure to flip the switch to off as well before you put it in your bag, or it will be down there draining the battery as it moves around.

title: Wireless Keyboard and Mouse Combo, EDJO Full-Sized Ergonomic Computer Keyboard with Wrist Rest and 3 Level DPI Adjustable Wireless Mouse for Windows, Mac OS Desktop/Laptop/PC (White)
features: 【ERGONOMIC WIRELESS KEYBOARD AND MOUSE COMBO】EDJO Full-sized wireless keyboard is ergonomically designed with Palm Rest and folding holder that can keep it at an optimum slope，prevent your wrists from hurting while long sessions of typing. Keyboard is also designed with anti-slide pads so it will stay in place when you're typing quickly. NOTE: THE USB RECEIVER IS INSERTED IN THE BATTERY COMPARTMENT OF THE MOUSE, YOU CAN FIND IT WHEN OPEN THE MOUSE BATTERY COVER.

【PLUG & PLAY 2.4G WIRELESS CONNECTION】One 2.4 GHz USB receiver can connect both the keyboard and mouse, can also be used separately, plug & play, no need to download any software. 2.4 GHz wireless provides a powerful and reliable connection up to 33 feet(10m) without any delays.

【AUTOMATIC POWER SAVING FUNCTION】The EDJO wireless keyboard and mouse combo has the function of automatically entering the power-saving state. When you stop using the keyboard more than 30 minutes, stop using the mouse more than 25 seconds, they will enter sleep mode respectively to save power. This feature greatly extends the battery life, you can click any button to activity the device. The keyboard need 1 x AA battery, the mouse need 1 x AA battery. (Battery Not Included)

【WIRELESS OPTICAL MOUSE】The mouse was optical design, even on some smooth surfaces, precise control can be obtained. 3-level adjustable DPI (800/1200/1600) allows you to choose your favorite moving speed of cursor. In addition, this wireless mouse is symmetry design, no matter you are Right handed Left handed, both hands are available, suitable for all people.

【UNIVERSAL COMPATIBILITY & AFTER-SALES SERVICE】This wireless keyboard and mice combo compatible with windows XP/Vista/7/8/10/X, Mac and other operating system. Works well with desktops, Chrome-book, PC, Laptop, Computer and more. If you encounter any problems during use, please contact us via Amazon email, we will provide a satisfactory solution.

reviews.title: works as expected
reviews.text: works perfect; smaller than my last one so much better for traveling

reviews.title: The mouse and keyboard work on the same USB plug.
reviews.text: The mouse and keyboard work on the same USB plug. I like the fact that this pair frees up one of your USB ports on your CPU. Thank you. God bless you. May the rest of your life be the best of your life.  OZ

reviews.title: Usable keyboard. Mouse is a little problematic.
reviews.text: The keyboard is good and more ergonomic than others but lack of function keys makes less than desirable. The mouse just kept, intermittently disconnecting so was unusable.

reviews.title: Comfortable to use
reviews.text: I didn't have any expectations for this wireless keyboard and mouse set. I just wanted it to sync up easily to the PC and it did. More than that, it is a surprisingly comfortable keyboard to work with. The keys are responsive and accurate. I can put it at an angle that I like. It is easy to store away. I just really like it more than I had expected. I may not have had particular expectations. I just wanted to try out a keyboard/mouse set on a PC that wasn't getting much use, but I may end up putting this set with my main PC set up. I like it that much.

reviews.title: Plug n Play
reviews.text: This is a nice keyboard mouse combo. Set up was simple. There is one dongle for both the keyboard and the mouse. The keyboard is quiet, comfortable and a good size. The mouse is responsive. Time will tell how long it lasts but for now I am pleased with its performance.

title: Wireless Mouse for MacBook Pro MacBook Air Laptop Mac iMac Desktop Computer Win7/8/10 PC HP Chromebook MacBook (Gray)
description: ✅ This wireless mouse plug and play, just two steps, is suitable for any desktop computer and laptop. The connection is 100% stable. It does not need to connect to the computer via Bluetooth, nor does it need to worry about Bluetooth disconnection and complex Bluetooth connection like a Bluetooth mousePacking list: instruction *1, Rechargeable Wireless Mouse *1, USB wireless receiver *1 (taken out from the bottom of the mouse), type C receiver *1 (taken out from the bottom of the mouse), USB charging cable *1, packing carton *1. ✅ How do I use this wireless mouse on my laptop?1: Remove the USB receiver or Type C receiver at the bottom of the mouse (remove the receiver suitable for your computer/laptop port) and plug the receiver into the port of your computer /laptop2: Turn on the mouse switch, move the mouse or press the left and right mouse buttons, and the mouse will start working on your computer desktop，Plug and play, only need 2 steps to use. 🔋How do I charge this mouse？br>🔋When the pointer of your mouse does not move or cannot be used, or suddenly disconnects continuously in use, you need to charge it for about 3 hours. Please use the USB port of your computer to charge it, or use an adapter with an output of no more than 5v to charge it🔋This is a rechargeable mouse. It doesn't require you to buy any other batteries. It already has a built-in lithium battery. It can be charged like a mobile phone. There is a USB charging line in the box
features: It is compatible with Mac iMac Macbook Pro Macbook Air 2012/2013/2014/2015/2016/2017/2018/2019/2020/2021 Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, 10/Windows and is suitable for desktop, notebook, PC, and other devices.

[Rechargeable Wireless Mouse] Built-in durable 450mAh lithium rechargeable battery can last up to 500 hours after fully charged, and standby time is super long with auto sleep and wake mode. Easily recharged through the included USB cable, no need to change the battery

✅ This wireless mouse plug and play, just two steps, is suitable for any desktop computer and laptop. The connection is 100% stable. It does not need to connect to the computer via Bluetooth, nor does it need to worry about Bluetooth disconnection and complex Bluetooth connection like a Bluetooth mouse

Control Your Own Speed at Your Will: 3 level DPI by press the button below the scroll wheel. No need any driver, plug and play directly. You can easily adjust the moving speed, perfect for games and office, meet your multiple needs.

【Skin-Friendly for Comfort & Mute Click】Silent click Mouse with classic design with anti-fingerprint finish offers your hand maximum support and comfort. The sturdy anti-slip rubber scroll wheel ensures that your hand will not slip when scrolling.Quiet click sound when pressing buttons, which let you not worry about the mouse sound can disturbing others, especially at home or office, when other members having rest, you can focused on your work without worry.

reviews.title: plugbroke
reviews.text: Actually loved it , until the plug that goes in the computer broke. Figured it might as it was a weak medal piece and bent easily. So am changing my stars on it as it should not happen. Don't know who to notify on it. Think twice if you are going to buy it, if it was used on the table instead of in a lap top it probably is great.

reviews.title: Sleek, attractive and works well.
reviews.text: This mouse works more smoothly than my last one.  I think it's attractive and less bulky than others.
